narrative: Markets sold off as renewed U.S.-Iran escalation pushed oil back toward $100 and kept inflation fears/high Treasury yields in focus, pressuring growth multiples and mega-cap tech. The Nasdaq slid into correction territory while defensives/energy held up relatively better amid rising volatility and risk-off positioning.

value_picks.name: Abbott Laboratories
value_picks.why_undervalued: Trading near 52-week low of $100.88 amid Q1 market downturn and sector underperformance in healthcare.
value_picks.bull_case: Durable diagnostics and med device franchise with positive FCF growth TTM $11.5B; analysts expect EPS rebound in 2026.

value_picks.name: Stryker Corporation
value_picks.why_undervalued: Hit near 52-week low $319 in late March during broad market derisking into defensives.
value_picks.bull_case: Leader in orthopedics and MedSurg with strong procedural recovery; consistent FCF supports dividend and growth.

value_picks.name: Medtronic plc
value_picks.why_undervalued: Recent 52-week lows screener hit amid Q1 healthcare lag.
value_picks.bull_case: Diversified medtech with ablation momentum; stable margins and balance sheet for recovery.

value_picks.name: Boston Scientific
value_picks.why_undervalued: Deep discount in volatile Q1 market, undervalued per comparisons.
value_picks.bull_case: Cardiovascular growth leader with FARAPULSE and WATCHMAN driving organic expansion.

value_picks.name: Walt Disney Company
value_picks.why_undervalued: Communication services laggard in Q1 2026 per Morningstar, trading 14% below fair value.
value_picks.bull_case: Iconic franchise with streaming stabilization and parks recovery ahead.

momentum_picks.name: AN2 Therapeutics Inc
momentum_picks.catalyst: Biotech breakout with strong clinical data in March driving massive monthly gain.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: High volatility typical of small-cap biotech but asymmetric upside on trial success.

momentum_picks.name: Tilly's Inc
momentum_picks.catalyst: Consumer cyclical momentum from retail sales surge into Q1 end.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Short-term momentum play with pullback risk in cyclical sector.

momentum_picks.name: Polaryx Therapeutics Inc
momentum_picks.catalyst: Healthcare momentum from pipeline progress announced in March.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Biotech momentum with catalyst-driven upside vs binary risk.

momentum_picks.name: Day One Biopharmaceuticals
momentum_picks.catalyst: Positive phase updates fueling biotech rally in March.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Strong momentum into quarter end with potential for continuation.

momentum_picks.name: Silvaco Group Inc
momentum_picks.catalyst: Tech sector rotation into software/semiconductors amid AI infra hype.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Momentum intact but sensitive to tech sector rotation.
